---
title: ""
output: 
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: lualatex
geometry: margin=1cm, landscape
header-includes:
- \usepackage{fontspec}
- \usepackage{longtable}
- \pagenumbering{gobble}
---
\setmainfont{Arial}
# Front material

You may include front material in this section. This material will only be on
the first page of the printout, not on every group's coversheet.

\newpage
```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
for(i in 1:length(by_group)){
  if(nrow(by_group[[i]]) == 0){next}
  cat("\\newpage")
  
  # Cover page (include additional text in a cat() call and end paragraphs with two newlines (\n\n)!)
  ## Header
  cat(paste0("\\textbf{", cluster_cfg$name, "}\n\n"))
  cat(paste0("# Team #", i, "\n\n"))
  
  ## Content
  cat("Names: ____________________ and ____________________\n\n")
  cat(paste0(
    "**Addresses to visit: ",
    nrow(by_group[[i]]),
    "**\n\n"
  ))
  cat("\\newpage")
  
  # Table (you can, but probably shouldn't, edit this section)
  print(knitr::kable(by_group[[i]], format = "latex", longtable = T, escape = F))
}

```
